title: A car crash with dad happening — premonition #2 (Oct 27, 2019)
html:
TL;DR

  • Title-as-content note from late October 2019: "A car crash with dad happening." Body empty.
  • Second of the three dated dad death premonition entries from 2019 — between the August-25 "10:22 pm Augusta 24th" (2019 08 25 my dad dead augusta 24th) and the December-22 "dies it crashes tonight" (2019 12 22 dad dies it crashes tonight).
  • This is the entry that names the mechanism: car crash. The August premonition gave a time but no how; this one supplies the how that the December premonition then re-uses ("dies it crashes tonight").
  • Sits in the late-October cluster with do it for what changes lives and asking Maya where my father went wrong — Yahir is unmistakably orbiting the dad question all month.
  • Present-tense framing — "happening" — is the defining feature: not a worry-about-the-future, a recording-of-the-now. Same tense-move as the August premonition.

Notes

The note runs ten weeks after premonition #1 and eight weeks before premonition #3 — a roughly bi-monthly cadence through the back half of 2019. The form is the same: empty body, all weight on the title, present tense.

The new content is mechanism specification: car crash. In the GP context this isn't abstract — Yahir's father drives the Gtanos truck for work daily; the mom-said-Gtanos-client's-son-died-the-week-he-got-his-license note (March 2019) had already planted vehicular-death as a live local risk. The premonition is metabolizing that material.

Four days later, Yahir asks his sister Maya "where my father went wrong" (10 31 note) — the question shifts from will he die to what was his life, which is a particular flavor of pre-grief. The two notes together (premonition + retrospective-question) are the late-October processing-of-an-event-that-hasn't-occurred pair.

Dad does not die in 2019. But the premonition cluster is now formally one of the densest heightened perception threads in the corpus.

Privacy note

Discloses paternal-death anxiety; preserved because it anchors the premonition arc.

Connections

  • 2019 08 25 my dad dead augusta 24th — premonition #1
  • 2019 12 22 dad dies it crashes tonight — premonition #3
  • 2019 10 31 before i forget i ask maya where my father went wrong she re — same-week sibling
  • 2019 03 27 gtanos client son died — local-vehicular-death precursor
  • dad yahir · dad death premonitions · heightened perception trigger
  • gtanos · grants pass or · grants pass teen era · lineage as fate
  • maya
